allow: PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\Forrest Lin\\source\\repos\\Forrest-tech\\ImageAvatar\\ImageAvatar"; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "dotnet" -ArgumentList "run --no-build --project ImageAvatar.csproj" -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput "C:\\Temp\\app_stdout.txt" -RedirectStandardError "C:\\Temp\\app_stderr.txt"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; if \(!$proc.HasExited\) { "App still running \(PID $\($proc.Id\)\) - no crash"; $proc.Kill\(\) } else { "App exited with code $\($proc.ExitCode\)" }; Get-Content "C:\\Temp\\app_stderr.txt" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 40)
